product_overview: A client-side React application to validate REM (.xlsx/.xlsm) files against DEIS rules, present a prioritized list of findings, and export consolidated reports. The app performs filename checks, runs a dynamic rule engine across workbook sheets, and surfaces results in summary cards and a findings table.
core_goals: Allow users to upload REM Excel files (.xlsx, .xlsm) and receive immediate client-side validation results.
Validate filename conventions and establishment identifiers against the official catalog.
Execute a dynamic rule engine that checks cell-level rules (including cross-sheet checks) and classifies findings into ERROR / REVISAR / INDICADOR.
Present validation summaries and detailed findings in a usable UI with the ability to export results to an Excel report.
Keep all processing client-side to preserve privacy and avoid sending sensitive data to servers.

features.name: Upload Excel File for Validation
features.description: Users can drag-and-drop or select a .xlsx/.xlsm REM file on the main page for client-side processing; the app runs validations and displays summary cards and findings.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file (.xlsx or .xlsm) -> Wait for processing -> See rule validation summary cards displayed -> See total findings count
Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file with unsupported extension (.pdf) -> Wait briefly -> See 'Unsupported file type' error message
Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select a corrupted Excel file -> Wait for processing -> See 'File processing failed' error message with option to retry

features.name: Filename Validation (REM01)
features.description: Validate that the uploaded filename follows the REM naming convention (CodEstab(6)Serie(1-2)Mes(2).xlsx/xlsm) and that the establishment code exists in the included catalog.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file named with pattern CodEstabSerieMes.xlsx -> Wait for processing -> See filename validation PASS indicator on summary card labeled REM01 -> Proceed to full rule validations
Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file with incorrect filename format -> Wait for processing -> See REM01 ERROR summary card with message 'Invalid filename format'

Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file with valid pattern but CodEstab not in catalog -> Wait for processing -> See REM01 REVISAR (warning) card with message 'Unknown establishment code'

features.name: Rule Engine Processing and Findings
features.description: A dynamic rules engine evaluates workbook cells (including cross-sheet checks, formulas, blanks) and emits classified findings (ERROR / REVISAR / INDICADOR) surfaced in summary cards and the findings table.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select a valid REM Excel file -> Wait for processing -> See rule validation summary cards update with counts by severity -> Click a summary card to focus related findings
Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file that contains no violations -> Wait for processing -> See summary cards show zero ERRORs and success indicators

Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file that triggers an internal rule engine exception -> Wait for processing -> See 'Validation failed' error message and an option to export error log

features.name: Findings Table and Detail View
features.description: Display prioritized findings in a table with native icons and a Detail action to view rule evidence, affected cells, rule description and suggested fixes.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file -> Wait for processing -> View rule validation summary cards -> Click a summary card -> See FindingsTable filtered to that rule set

Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file -> Wait for processing -> Click 'Detail' action on a finding row -> See a detail panel or modal showing rule description, affected sheet and cell references, and suggested remediation

Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file -> Wait for processing -> Click 'Detail' on a finding for which evidence cannot be resolved -> See message 'Finding details unavailable' and option to view raw rule evaluation trace

features.name: Export Results to Excel
features.description: Export the consolidated validation results and findings to a downloadable Excel report that preserves rule semantics and ordering.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file -> Wait for processing -> Click Export results to Excel -> See file download start with consolidated report in Excel format
Navigate to / -> Open / without uploading a file -> Click Export results to Excel -> See 'No results to export' message

Navigate to / -> Drag and drop or select an Excel file -> Wait for processing -> Click Export results to Excel -> Export fails due to client error -> See 'Export failed' error message with retry option

features.name: Upload Excel File for Validation
features.description: Users upload a .xlsx or .xlsm REM file to see validation errors.
user_interactions: Drag and drop or select an Excel file
